comment: Synthetic high-grade serous ovarian carcinoma FIGO IIIC, HRD-negative (BRCA1/2 wild-type, GIS<42), female 62. Engine walks ALGO-OVARIAN-ADVANCED-1L: step 3 (BRCA-mut RF) false → step 4 (HRD-positive RFs) false → step 5 (frailty RF) false → step 6 default → IND-OVARIAN-ADVANCED-1L-CARBO-PACLI-HRD-NEG. Carbo+pacli induction × 6, NO olaparib maintenance (HRD-neg subset has minimal benefit + MDS/AML risk). Bev maintenance per ICON-7/GOG-218 optional. Contrast case to existing patient_ovarian_advanced_hrd.json.
